name: dardock-clickup
description: Dardock workflow plugin for preparing ClickUp tasks, comments, schemas, and automation payloads from agency context.

interface.shortDescription: Prepare and sync Dardock tasks with ClickUp workflows.
interface.longDescription: Turns Dardock client context, WhatsApp notes, Notion reports, and campaign blockers into ClickUp-ready tasks, comments, priorities, and definitions of done. Designed to avoid duplicate markdown task boards.
defaultPrompt: Crea una tarea ClickUp para Dany desde esta nota de WhatsApp.
Convierte estos bloqueos de tracking en tareas priorizadas para ClickUp.
Prepara comentario ClickUp y bloque Notion con este avance de cliente.
